title: bihai metallica
intro: Bihai metallica, commonly known as Metallica twigs or Jin Kui Shen, is a type of plant used in traditional Chinese medicine, particularly in the Kunming region. It is characterized by its unique, twisted branches that resemble metal, hence its name. The health benefits of Bihai metallica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. Its therapeutic actions are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and vasodilatory effects.
intro_study: According to "Biological trace element research", bihai metallica benefits include enhanced biocompatibility of essential elements such as Na, K, Ca, Mg, V, Mn, Fe, Cu, and Zn when taken in conjunction with milk, butter, honey, or ghee, thereby eliminating their harmful effects.
side_effects: Bihai metallica can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and stomach ulcers due to excessive consumption. In rare cases, it can also cause allergic reactions, such as itching, hives, and difficulty breathing, particularly in individuals with pre-existing respiratory conditions. Furthermore, improper use of Bihai metallica can lead to an imbalance of essential nutrients in the body, resulting in symptoms like fatigue, muscle weakness, and hair loss. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Bihai metallica or any other herbal remedy to avoid potential side effects.
